snippet.title: Perseverance RoverÔÇÖs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: NASAÔÇÖS Perseverance RoverÔÇÖs First 360 View of Mars (Official)
snippet.description:
This video shows the first 360-degree view of the landing site of NASAÔÇÖs Perseverance rover on Mars, as captured by the roverÔÇÖs color Navigation Cameras, or Navcams. The Navcams are on the remote sensing mast (or ÔÇťheadÔÇŁ) of the rover.  Perseverance possesses the most cameras of any Mars rover to date, with 19 on the rover. Perseverance landed on MarsÔÇÖ Jezero Crater on February 18, 2021. These images were obtained on February 20, 2021. 

A key objective for PerseveranceÔÇÖs mission on Mars is astrobiology, including the search for signs of ancient microbial life. The rover will characterize the planetÔÇÖs geology and past climate, pave the way for human exploration of the Red Planet, and be the first mission to collect and cache Martian rock and regolith.


Please note: Not all browsers support viewing 360 videos. YouTube supports their playback on computers using Chrome, Firefox, Internet Explorer, and Opera browsers. For best experience on a mobile device, play this video in the YouTube app.

For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance


Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

ZAM├ôW PREORDER P┼üYTY: https://defjam.pl/sobel

Album ÔÇťPu┼éapka na motyleÔÇŁ to fundamentacja pozycji Sobla na rynku. Ceny wariant├│w z merchem wahaj─ů si─Ö od zestawu ze skarpetkami za 99 PLN do pe┼énego pakietu za 450 PLN. Ka┼╝dy egzemplarz preorderowego albumu zawiera─ç b─Ödzie autograf Sobla.

snippet.title: Panorama of Mars from Perseverance Rover
snippet.description:
This panorama, taken on Feb. 20, 2021, by the Navigation Cameras, or Navcams, aboard NASAÔÇÖs Perseverance Mars rover, was stitched together from six individual images after they were sent back to Earth. 

A key objective for PerseveranceÔÇÖs mission on Mars is astrobiology, including the search for signs of ancient microbial life. The rover will characterize the planetÔÇÖs geology and past climate, pave the way for human exploration of the Red Planet, and be the first mission to collect and cache Martian rock and regolith.

Subsequent missions, currently under consideration by NASA in cooperation with ESA (European Space Agency), would send spacecraft to Mars to collect these cached samples from the surface and return them to Earth for in-depth analysis.

The Mars 2020 Perseverance mission is part of NASAÔÇÖs Moon to Mars exploration approach, which includes Artemis missions to the Moon that will help prepare for human exploration of the Red Planet.

NASAÔÇÖs Jet Propulsion Laboratory in Southern California built and manages operations of the Mars 2020 Perseverance rover for NASA.

For more information about the mission, go to: https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020

Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

The rover will characterize the planetÔÇÖs geology and past climate, pave the way for human exploration of the Red Planet, and be the first mission to collect and cache Martian rock and regolith.

Subsequent missions, currently under consideration by NASA in cooperation with ESA (European Space Agency), would send spacecraft to Mars to collect these cached samples from the surface and return them to Earth for in-depth analysis.

The Mars 2020 Perseverance mission is part of NASAÔÇÖs Moon to Mars exploration approach, which includes Artemis missions to the Moon that will help prepare for human exploration of the Red Planet.

NASAÔÇÖs Jet Propulsion Laboratory in Southern California built and manages operations of the Mars 2020 Perseverance rover for NASA.

For more information about the mission, go to: https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020

Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Koronawirus w Polsce. Nowe obostrzenia, konferencja prasowa ministra zdrowia
snippet.description:

Zmieniaj─ů si─Ö zasady dotycz─ůce zas┼éaniania twarzy oraz dotycz─ůce przekraczania granic na po┼éudniu kraju. Nowe ograniczenia obowi─ůzywa─ç b─Öd─ů od soboty w woj. warmi┼äsko-mazurskim. Dlaczego? Z uwagi na zr├│┼╝nicowan─ů sytuacj─Ö w poszczeg├│lnych cz─Ö┼Ťciach kraju, ministerstwo uzna┼éo, ┼╝e czas na regionalizacj─Ö obostrze┼ä. Najgorzej pod wzgl─Ödem zaka┼╝e┼ä wypada w┼éa┼Ťnie wojew├│dztwo warmi┼äsko-mazurskie.

snippet.title: Watch NASAÔÇÖs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover ÔÇô the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space ÔÇô search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASAÔÇÖs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: Ka┼Ťka Sochacka - Ciche dni
snippet.description:
­čÄž http://www.soundline.biz/KaskaSochackaCicheDni
­čôÇ Preorder albumu "Ciche dni": http://bit.ly/2ZGPpPZ

Przeczytaj rozmow─Ö z Ka┼Ťk─ů dla Red Bull Music: https://www.redbull.com/pl-pl/kaska-sochacka-ciche-dni-premiera

Zobacz tak┼╝e:
Wi┼Ťnia: https://youtu.be/gsl69na5ltc
Wi┼Ťnia (Live) feat. Kortez z zespo┼éem: https://youtu.be/3C2SBoAaqK4
Jeszcze: https://youtu.be/aacRbXfgAjU
┼Ünie: https://youtu.be/lQDHy_jYYFs
Zachody: https://youtu.be/1Qq_-9T2S9Q

ÔÇ×Ciche dniÔÇŁ to pierwsza zapowied┼║ debiutanckiego albumu Ka┼Ťki Sochackiej o tym samym tytule, kt├│ry uka┼╝e si─Ö 26 marca 2021 roku nak┼éadem Jazzboy Records. Za finalny kszta┼ét piosenek razem z Ka┼Ťk─ů odpowiadaj─ů: Agata Trafalska (pomoc przy tekstach) i Olek ┼Üwierkot (produkcja) - tandem, kt├│ry da┼é si─Ö pozna─ç przy debiucie Korteza (ÔÇ×BumerangÔÇŁ) i jego drugiej p┼éycie (ÔÇ×M├│j domÔÇŁ).
 
Piosence ÔÇ×Ciche dniÔÇŁ towarzyszy klip, w kt├│rym para drewnianych bohater├│w prze┼╝ywa zwi─ůzkowy kryzys w uroczy spos├│b ods┼éaniaj─ůc przed nami uniwersalne schematy jakimi rz─ůdz─ů si─Ö nasze mi┼éosne perypetie. W obrazie wykorzystano tak┼╝e fragmenty filmu "P├│┼énoc - p├│┼énocny zach├│d" z 1959 roku w re┼╝yserii Alfreda Hitchcocka.
 
ÔÇ×Wszystko zacz─Ö┼éo si─Ö od ÔÇ×Wi┼ŤniÔÇŁ. Znaczy zacz─Ö┼éo si─Ö du┼╝o wcze┼Ťniej - i o tym opowiada Ka┼Ťka w swoim ÔÇ×Love StoryÔÇŁ, kt├│re do┼é─ůczone b─Ödzie do p┼éyty - ale to ÔÇ×Wi┼ŤniaÔÇŁ nada┼éa sprawom tempo. To by┼éo jak kula ┼Ťniegowa - Piotr Stelmach i jego audycja, p├│┼║niej Kortez - jego wersja numeru i wyst─Öpy go┼Ťcinne na jego koncertach, pierwsze miejsce LP3 przez 4 tygodnie z rz─Ödu - wszystko dzia┼éo si─Ö bardzo szybko i przeros┼éo nasze oczekiwania. Ludzie kibicowali, chcieli pom├│c, do┼é─ůczy─ç si─Ö - i tak spontanicznie pojawi┼éo si─Ö na p┼éycie kilku znakomitych go┼Ťci.
Ka┼Ťka i Olek ┼Ťwietnie si─Ö bawili w studiu i zupe┼énie niepostrze┼╝enie przygotowali materia┼é, kt├│ry wszystkich nas urzek┼é. T─Ö rado┼Ť─ç i brak napi─Öcia naprawd─Ö s┼éycha─ç na p┼éycie, mimo, ┼╝e w tekstach gdzieniegdzie pobrzmiewa nutka szlachetnego smutku.ÔÇŁ ÔÇô Agata Trafalska.
 
P┼éyta ÔÇ×Ciche dniÔÇŁ, kt├│ra premier─Ö b─Ödzie mie─ç 26 marca 2021 roku, opowiada o kolei rzeczy w zwi─ůzku, o p─Ötlach jakie zataczamy, naszych najwi─Ökszych obawach, o kryzysach, w─ůtpliwo┼Ťciach i walce z samym sob─ů. Opowiedziana z perspektywy kobiety, kt├│ra ca┼éy czas pr├│buje z┼éapa─ç w tym wszystkim r├│wnowag─Ö. Historia, to scenki z ┼╝ycia zwi─ůzku przedstawione z lekko┼Ťci─ů i dystansem ┼Ťwiadomego, pogodzonego ze wszystkim cz┼éowieka.
____

Joe Gardner nauczyciel muzyki, kt├│rego najwi─Öksz─ů pasj─ů jest jazz, otrzymuje ┼╝yciow─ů szans─Ö: b─Ödzie m├│g┼é gra─ç w najlepszym klubie jazzowym w mie┼Ťcie. Zdeterminowany by powr├│ci─ç do swojego ziemskiego ┼╝ycia, Joe ┼é─ůczy si┼éy z dusz─ů 22, kt├│rej zupe┼énie obce s─ů uroki ludzkiej egzystencji. ÔÇó đáĐľĐłđÁđŻđŻĐĆ đÜđŞĐŚđ▓ĐüĐîđ║đżĐŚ đ╝ĐľĐüĐîđ║đżĐŚ ĐÇđ░đ┤đŞ đ▓Đľđ┤ 2 đ╗ĐÄĐéđżđ│đż 2006 ĐÇđżđ║Đâ Ôäľ 101/3192 đčĐÇđż đ┐đÁĐÇđÁđ┤đ░ĐçĐâ đĚđÁđ╝đÁđ╗ĐîđŻđżĐŚ đ┤Đľđ╗ĐĆđŻđ║đŞ ĐÇđÁĐüĐéđżĐÇđ░đŻĐâ "đöĐľđ╗đżđ▓Đľ đĚĐâĐüĐéĐÇĐľĐçĐľ" (Đéđżđ▓đ░ĐÇđŞĐüĐéđ▓đż đĚ đżđ▒đ╝đÁđÂđÁđŻđżĐÄ đ▓Đľđ┤đ┐đżđ▓Đľđ┤đ░đ╗ĐîđŻĐľĐüĐéĐÄ) đ┤đ╗ĐĆ đ▒Đâđ┤Đľđ▓đŻđŞĐćĐéđ▓đ░ đÂđŞĐéđ╗đżđ▓đżđ│đż đ▒Đâđ┤đŞđŻđ║Đâ đĚ đ▓đ▒Đâđ┤đżđ▓đ░đŻđŞđ╝đŞ đżĐäĐľĐüđŻđŞđ╝đŞ đ┐ĐÇđŞđ╝ĐľĐëđÁđŻđŻĐĆđ╝đŞ Đľ đżđ▒'Đöđ║Đéđ░đ╝đŞ ĐüđżĐćĐľđ░đ╗ĐîđŻđż-đ┐đżđ▒ĐâĐéđżđ▓đżĐŚ ĐüĐäđÁĐÇđŞ đŻđ░ đ▓Đâđ╗. đÜĐÇĐâđ│đ╗đżĐâđŻĐľđ▓đÁĐÇĐüđŞĐéđÁĐéĐüĐîđ║Đľđ╣, 5 - 7 Đâ đčđÁĐçđÁĐÇĐüĐîđ║đżđ╝Đâ ĐÇđ░đ╣đżđŻĐľ đ╝. đÜđŞĐöđ▓đ░
đáĐľĐłđÁđŻđŻĐĆ đÜđŞĐŚđ▓ĐüĐîđ║đżĐŚ đ╝ĐľĐüĐîđ║đżĐŚ ĐÇđ░đ┤đŞ đ▓Đľđ┤ 29 đ╗đŞĐüĐéđżđ┐đ░đ┤đ░ 2012 ĐÇđżđ║Đâ Ôäľ 634/8918 đčĐÇđż đ┐đżđŻđżđ▓đ╗đÁđŻđŻĐĆ ĐÇđÁĐüĐéđżĐÇđ░đŻĐâ "đöĐľđ╗đżđ▓Đľ đĚĐâĐüĐéĐÇĐľĐçĐľ" (Đéđżđ▓đ░ĐÇđŞĐüĐéđ▓đż đĚ đżđ▒đ╝đÁđÂđÁđŻđżĐÄ đ▓Đľđ┤đ┐đżđ▓Đľđ┤đ░đ╗ĐîđŻĐľĐüĐéĐÄ) đ┤đżđ│đżđ▓đżĐÇĐâ đżĐÇđÁđŻđ┤đŞ đĚđÁđ╝đÁđ╗ĐîđŻđżĐŚ đ┤Đľđ╗ĐĆđŻđ║đŞ đ┤đ╗ĐĆ đ▒Đâđ┤Đľđ▓đŻđŞĐćĐéđ▓đ░, đÁđ║Đüđ┐đ╗Đâđ░Đéđ░ĐćĐľĐŚ Đéđ░ đżđ▒Đüđ╗Đâđ│đżđ▓Đâđ▓đ░đŻđŻĐĆ đ│đżĐéđÁđ╗ĐîđŻđżđ│đż đ║đżđ╝đ┐đ╗đÁđ║ĐüĐâ đŻđ░ đ▓Đâđ╗. đÜĐÇĐâđ│đ╗đżĐâđŻĐľđ▓đÁĐÇĐüđŞĐéđÁĐéĐüĐîđ║Đľđ╣, 5 - 7 Đâ đčđÁĐçđÁĐÇĐüĐîđ║đżđ╝Đâ ĐÇđ░đ╣đżđŻĐľ đ╝. đÜđŞĐöđ▓đ░ Đéđ░ đ▓đŻđÁĐüđÁđŻđŻĐĆ đĚđ╝ĐľđŻ đ┤đż đŻĐîđżđ│đż (đčđżđŻđżđ▓đŞĐéđŞ đŻđ░ 5 ĐÇđżđ║Đľđ▓ đ┤đżđ│đżđ▓ĐľĐÇ đżĐÇđÁđŻđ┤đŞ)

snippet.description:
New Line Cinema przedstawia now─ů wybuchow─ů przygod─Ö filmow─ů pod tytu┼éem Mortal Kombat. Produkcja jest zainspirowana bestsellerow─ů seri─ů gier wideo, kt├│rej najnowsza ods┼éona, Mortal Kombat 11, cieszy┼éa si─Ö niedawno najlepszym debiutem ze wszystkich cz─Ö┼Ťci. Producentami s─ů James Wan (filmy z uniwersum Obecno┼Ť─ç, Aquaman), Todd Garner (Epicentrum, Berek), sam McQuoid oraz E. Bennett Walsh (Men in Black: International, Niesamowity Spider-Man 2). 
Zawodnik mieszanych sztuk walki Cole Young przywyk┼é do tego, ┼╝e obrywa za pieni─ůdze. Nie ma jednak poj─Öcia o swoim pochodzeniu i nie wie, dlaczego w┼éadca Za┼Ťwiat├│w Shang Tsung nas┼éa┼é na niego swojego najlepszego wojownika, Sub-Zero, kriomancera z innego wymiaru. W obawie o bezpiecze┼ästwo rodziny Cole udaje si─Ö na poszukiwanie Sonyi Blade, polecon─ů mu przez Jaxa. Ten major si┼é specjalnych ma takie samo dziwne znami─Ö w kszta┼écie smoka, z jakim urodzi┼é si─Ö Cole. Wkr├│tce Cole trafia do ┼Ťwi─ůtyni Lorda Raidena, jednego ze Starszych B├│stw i obro┼äcy Ziemi, zapewniaj─ůcego schronienie tym, kt├│rzy maj─ů smocze znami─Ö. W ┼Ťwi─ůtyni Cole trenuje z do┼Ťwiadczonymi wojownikami Liu Kangiem i Kung Lao oraz zbuntowanym najemnikiem Kano.  Wsp├│lnie stan─ů do walki najwi─Ökszych mistrz├│w Ziemi z przeciwnikami z Za┼Ťwiat├│w, w kt├│rej stawk─ů jest wszech┼Ťwiat. Ale czy Cole zdo┼éa uwolni─ç swoje arcana ÔÇô niezmierzon─ů moc we wn─Ötrzu duszy ÔÇô i zd─ů┼╝y nie tylko ocali─ç bliskich, ale i powstrzyma─ç Za┼Ťwiaty raz na zawsze?
Plejada wykonawc├│w z ca┼éego ┼Ťwiata oddaje globaln─ů natur─Ö marki. TRACI─ć

sztywno┼Ť─ç karku, w nogach wata
┼╝eby kto┼Ť zyska┼é, kto┼Ť musi straci─ç   
w pustym parku, szepcz─ů lata
mglista my┼Ťl, milcz─ůce ptaki
p┼éytki oddech, mrowienie w wargach
przychodzi do mnie miniony ┼Ťwiat jak
do ciep┼éej d┼éoni sp┼éoszona sarna
jak melodia, kt├│rej nie s┼éysza┼éem ju┼╝ od dawna
ko┼éatanie serca, ucisk w klatce
pomy┼Ťle─ç ┼╝e tam walcz─ů w mma gdzie┼Ť
a ja jak d┼║wi─Ök z odleg┼éo┼Ťci─ů s┼éabn─Ö
nie wiem dok─ůd i┼Ť─ç, wi─Öc id─Ö na marne
┼Ťwiat m├│wi do mnie, s┼éowa s─ů martwe
czuj─Ö apati─Ö w ka┼╝dej synapsie 
w prze┼Ťlicznej walce, przegra┼éem - trudno
zosta┼éem budd─ů, w tragicznej masce
jeszcze czasami wyj─Ö jeszcze warcz─Ö            
na sw├│j ┼éa┼äcuch dna i na swoj─ů karm─Ö
poznaj─Ö swoje miejsce w szeregu nast─Öpstw 
rozdmuchuj─Ö moment zanim zga┼Ťnie 
nawet dla siebie z czasem trac─Ö wa┼╝no┼Ť─ç
szanse, si┼éy, zdrowie, talent, sprawno┼Ť─ç
wszystko co robi─Ö jak na szybie oddech
nawet w pocz─ůtkach widz─Ö tylko ko┼äce

chyba najlepiej w ┼╝yciu umiem
traci─ç...


BLADY KR├ôL

i sam ju┼╝ nie wiesz, czy to cia┼éo 
czy to rze┼║ba
przez woal sk├│ry 
blado przebijaj─ů 
┼╝ebra
upad┼éy dawid
nawet micha┼é anio┼é 
kl─Öka
a wasze oczy si─Ö ┼Ťlizgaj─ů
po powierzchniach
to estetyka nie dla waszych ram
wi─Öc przesta┼ä
wci─ů┼╝ por├│wnywa─ç marmur 
do lichego drewna
ma┼éo co tak jak up┼éyw czasu 
uszlachetnia
prawdziwy ci─Ö┼╝ar
pi─Ökna
nie mog─Ö straci─ç w┼éadzy
bo nie panuj─Ö nad niczym
jedyn─ů zalet─ů ÔÇô wady
rozum -  poza prawem logiki
zaprz─Ögam dla dobra sprawy
wszystkie te destrukcyjne nawyki
kt├│re pr├│buj─ů mnie zabi─ç
kogo? 
do lat jestem nikim
tak d┼éugo wr├│┼╝─ů upadek
lecz moje ruchy jak i ching
nie zrozumieliby nawet wtedy
gdybym ich wtajemniczy┼é
lubi─Ö si─Ö chowa─ç w r─Ökawie
na koniec bior─Ö ca┼éy st├│┼é    
i kto tu jest asem?
kiedy jak joker wchodz─Ö
blady kr├│l    

m├│wi─ů: we┼║ si─Ö w gar┼Ť─ç 
nike z samotraki
m├│wi─ů: g┼éowy nie tra─ç 
nike z samotraki
m├│wi─Ö rad─Ö sobie dam
ilu tak potrafi?             
rozwija─ç kamienne skrzyd┼éa jak

P R Z E C Z Y T A J    Z A N I M    S K O M E N T U J E S Z 

Drodzy Widzowie, ci, kt├│rzy nas popieraj─ů oraz ci, kt├│rzy nienawidz─ů...
 
Kilka s┼é├│w wyja┼Ťnienia.

* Autor nagrania nie musia┼é wzywa─ç Policji od razu i sp─Ödzi─ç w tym miejscu dodatkowych dw├│ch godzin. Maj─ůc mocny dow├│d w postaci filmu mo┼╝emy zg┼éosi─ç kierowc─Ö w terminie p├│┼║niejszym. Natomiast dzie┼ä po publikacji Policja sama zainteresowa┼éa si─Ö spraw─ů i zajmuje si─Ö ni─ů Wydzia┼é Ruchu Drogowego Komendy Sto┼éecznej Policji.

* W Parku Br├│dnowskim prowadzone s─ů prace modernizacyjne zbiornik├│w wodnych. O ile plac budowy jest ogrodzony, to droga dojazdowa na budow─Ö nie jest zabezpieczona w og├│le. Zarz─ůdca parku wyrazi┼é zgod─Ö na dojazd wykonawcy samochodami dostawczymi i ci─Ö┼╝arowymi. Ka┼╝dy pojazd powinien mie─ç umieszczony w widocznym miejscu identyfikator, a tak┼╝e mie─ç przy sobie zezwolenie z Urz─Ödu Dzielnicy.

* Wykonawca by┼é zobowi─ůzany zabezpieczy─ç doj┼Ťcia do alej stosownymi barierkami ÔÇô nie zrobi┼é tego.

Oczywi┼Ťcie, ┼╝e zale┼╝y nam na wy┼Ťwietleniach, przez co mo┼╝emy nag┼éo┼Ťni─ç patologiczne zachowania kierowc├│w na chodnikach (sic!). Dzi─Öki zasi─Ögowi tego filmu ju┼╝ dzie┼ä po publikacji:

đíđ╝đżĐéĐÇđŞĐéđÁ đżđŻđ╗đ░đ╣đŻ 2 đ▓Đőđ┐ĐâĐüđ║ đťđ░ĐüĐéđÁĐÇđĘđÁĐä. đčĐÇđżĐäđÁĐüĐüđŞđżđŻđ░đ╗Đő-3 đŻđ░ đŻđ░ĐłđÁđ╝ đ║đ░đŻđ░đ╗đÁ! đčđÁĐÇđ▓Đőđ╣ ĐŹĐéđ░đ┐ đżĐéđ▒đżĐÇđ░ đ┐ĐÇđżĐłđÁđ╗. đóđÁđ┐đÁĐÇĐî đ║Đâđ╗đŞđŻđ░ĐÇĐő đ│đżĐéđżđ▓Đő đ┐đżđ▒đżĐÇđżĐéĐîĐüĐĆ đĚđ░ đ╝đÁĐüĐéđż đŻđ░ đ▒đ░đ╗đ║đżđŻđÁ. đĺ ĐŹĐéđżđ╝ đ│đżđ┤Đâ ĐüĐâđ┤ĐîđŞ đ┐đżđ┤đÁđ╗đŞđ╗đŞ đ┐đżđ▓đ░ĐÇđżđ▓ đŻđ░ ĐéĐÇđŞ đ│ĐÇĐâđ┐đ┐Đő đ▓ đĚđ░đ▓đŞĐüđŞđ╝đżĐüĐéđŞ đżĐé Đéđżđ│đż, đ║đ░đ║ đżđŻđŞ đ┐đżđ║đ░đĚđ░đ╗đŞ ĐüđÁđ▒ĐĆ đŻđ░ đ║đ░ĐüĐéđŞđŻđ│đÁ. đÜđ░đÂđ┤đżđ╣ đ│ĐÇĐâđ┐đ┐đÁ đ┐ĐÇđŞđ┤Đâđ╝đ░đ╗đŞ đżĐéđ┤đÁđ╗ĐîđŻĐőđÁ đŞĐüđ┐ĐőĐéđ░đŻđŞĐĆ.
đčđÁĐÇđ▓đ░ĐĆ đ▒Đâđ┤đÁĐé đ│đżĐéđżđ▓đŞĐéĐî đ▒đ╗ĐÄđ┤đ░ ĐÇđÁĐüĐéđżĐÇđ░đŻđŻđżđ│đż ĐâĐÇđżđ▓đŻĐĆ đŞđĚ đ╝đżđŻđżđ┐ĐÇđżđ┤Đâđ║Đéđ░. đčđżđ╗ĐâĐçđŞĐéĐüĐĆ đ╗đŞ Đâ đ┐ĐÇđżĐäđÁĐüĐüđŞđżđŻđ░đ╗đżđ▓ đ┐ĐÇđŞđ│đżĐéđżđ▓đŞĐéĐî ĐçĐéđż-Đéđż đŞđŻĐéđÁĐÇđÁĐüđŻđżđÁ đŞđĚ Đéđżđ┐đŞđŻđ░đ╝đ▒ĐâĐÇđ░ đŞ đ╗Đâđ║đ░-đ┐đżĐÇđÁĐĆ? đúđĚđŻđ░đ╣ĐéđÁ đ▓ ĐłđżĐâ đťđ░ĐüĐéđÁĐÇđĘđÁĐä. đčĐÇđżĐäđÁĐüĐüđŞđżđŻđ░đ╗Đő-3!
đĺĐéđżĐÇđ░ĐĆ đ│ĐÇĐâđ┐đ┐đ░ đ┐ĐÇđŞđ│đżĐéđżđ▓đŞĐé đ┐đż đ┐ĐĆĐéĐî đ░Đüđ╝đŞĐüđ▒ĐâĐłđÁđ╣-đżđ▒đ╝đ░đŻđżđ║, đ░ ĐéĐÇđÁĐéĐîĐĆ ÔÇô đ┐đżĐüĐéđ░ĐÇđ░đÁĐéĐüĐĆ đ▓ ĐéđżĐçđŻđżĐüĐéđŞ đ▓đżĐüđ┐ĐÇđżđŞđĚđ▓đÁĐüĐéđŞ đ▒đ╗ĐÄđ┤đ░, đ┐ĐÇđŞđ│đżĐéđżđ▓đ╗đÁđŻđŻĐőđÁ ĐüĐâđ┤ĐîĐĆđ╝đŞ. đÜĐéđż Đâđ┤đŞđ▓đŞĐé đşđ║ĐéđżĐÇđ░ đąđŞđ╝đÁđŻđÁĐü-đĹĐÇđ░đ▓đż Đüđ▓đżđŞđ╝ Đâđ╝đÁđŻđŞđÁđ╝ đ┐ĐÇđŞđ│đżĐéđżđ▓đŞĐéĐî ĐçĐéđż-Đéđż đŞđŻĐéđÁĐÇđÁĐüđŻđżđÁ đŞđĚ đ╝đŞđŻđŞđ╝Đâđ╝đ░ đ┐ĐÇđżđ┤Đâđ║Đéđżđ▓? đúđĚđŻđ░đ╣ĐéđÁ đ▓ đ┐ĐÇđżđÁđ║ĐéđÁ đťđ░ĐüĐéđÁĐÇđĘđÁĐä. đčĐÇđżĐäđÁĐüĐüđŞđżđŻđ░đ╗Đő 3 ĐüđÁđĚđżđŻ 2 đ▓Đőđ┐ĐâĐüđ║ đżĐé 13.02.2021!

snippet.title: Camogli, crolla una parte del cimitero e le bare finiscono in mare
snippet.description:
La frana nel comune del genovese. Sul posto i vigili del fuoco di Rapallo

 Una frana ha provocato oggi pomeriggio il crollo di una grossa porzione del cimitero di Camogli, borgo marinaro e turistico in provincia di Genova. Una porzione del costone roccioso in cima al quale si trova il camposanto e├Ę precipitato in mare trascinando via loculi e tombe. Almeno 200 bare sono finite in acqua. Sul posto sono arrivate le squadre dei vigili del fuoco di Rapallo e una squadra di sommozzatori. Non sono ancora chiare le cause del crollo del terreno che ospita il cimitero ma da alcuni giorni erano in corso lavori proprio sulla falesia franata in mare perch├ę erano stati registrati movimenti di terreno. Nei giorni scorsi la parete era stata investita da una forte mareggiata che ha ulteriormente eroso il terreno. Il crollo ha trascinato con s├Ę un'ala del cimitero occupata da alcune centinaia di loculi. Pompieri e personale della Protezione Civile ha tentato da subito il recupero dei feretri finiti in acqua ma solo una decina a sera erano stati riportati a terra.  ┬źVicino all'area del crollo - ha spiegato il sindaco di Camogli Francesco Olivari - sono in corso lavoro di consolidamento della falesia. Da una prima analisi, ma solo domani potremo fare esami pi├╣ accurati, emerge che ├Ę stato un crollo difficilmente prevedibile e contenibile┬╗.  La Guardia costiera ha sistemato delle barriere in mare per contenere i materiali finiti in acqua e non ancora recuperati. ( Corriere Tv ). Guarda il video su Corriere: https://video.corriere.it/cronaca/camogli-crolla-parte-cimitero-bare-finiscono-mare/20a3ce20-7531-11eb-b048-5f97627f6464

localized.title: Camogli, crolla una parte del cimitero e le bare finiscono in mare
localized.description:
La frana nel comune del genovese. Sul posto i vigili del fuoco di Rapallo

 Una frana ha provocato oggi pomeriggio il crollo di una grossa porzione del cimitero di Camogli, borgo marinaro e turistico in provincia di Genova. Una porzione del costone roccioso in cima al quale si trova il camposanto e├Ę precipitato in mare trascinando via loculi e tombe. Almeno 200 bare sono finite in acqua. Sul posto sono arrivate le squadre dei vigili del fuoco di Rapallo e una squadra di sommozzatori. Non sono ancora chiare le cause del crollo del terreno che ospita il cimitero ma da alcuni giorni erano in corso lavori proprio sulla falesia franata in mare perch├ę erano stati registrati movimenti di terreno. Nei giorni scorsi la parete era stata investita da una forte mareggiata che ha ulteriormente eroso il terreno. Il crollo ha trascinato con s├Ę un'ala del cimitero occupata da alcune centinaia di loculi. Pompieri e personale della Protezione Civile ha tentato da subito il recupero dei feretri finiti in acqua ma solo una decina a sera erano stati riportati a terra.  ┬źVicino all'area del crollo - ha spiegato il sindaco di Camogli Francesco Olivari - sono in corso lavoro di consolidamento della falesia. Da una prima analisi, ma solo domani potremo fare esami pi├╣ accurati, emerge che ├Ę stato un crollo difficilmente prevedibile e contenibile┬╗.  La Guardia costiera ha sistemato delle barriere in mare per contenere i materiali finiti in acqua e non ancora recuperati. ( Corriere Tv ). snippet.title: JAK ZNALE┼╣─ć CH┼üOPAKA ÔÇô SZALONE PORADY || Dobrze znane sytuacje, kt├│re zrozumiej─ů tylko dziewczyny
snippet.description:
Jak zdoby─ç ch┼éopaka? Macie swoj─ů sympati─Ö?

A mo┼╝e chcecie, ┼╝eby ch┼éopak natychmiast zapragn─ů┼é p├│j┼Ť─ç z wami na randk─Ö?

Trafi┼éy┼Ťcie pod w┼éa┼Ťciwy adres ÔÇô ten filmik jest w┼éa┼Ťnie dla was!



#┼ŤmieszneÔÇő #dladziewczynÔÇő #sztuczkiÔÇő #znanesytuacjeÔÇő


Ten filmik powsta┼é w celach rozrywkowych. Nie udzielamy ┼╝adnych gwarancji odno┼Ťnie dok┼éadno┼Ťci, bezpiecze┼ästwa i rzetelno┼Ťci. Wszelkie dzia┼éania inspirowane zawartymi tu informacjami s─ů podejmowane na w┼éasne ryzyko. Nie ponosimy odpowiedzialno┼Ťci za jakiekolwiek szkody lub straty. W razie pr├│by odtworzenia przedstawionych czynno┼Ťci widz powinien w┼éa┼Ťciwie oceni─ç sytuacj─Ö i zachowa─ç ┼Ťrodki ostro┼╝no┼Ťci.

Niniejszy filmik mo┼╝e prezentowa─ç czynno┼Ťci wykonywane przez naszych aktor├│w w ┼Ťrodowisku kontrolowanym ÔÇô je┼Ťli planujesz je powt├│rzy─ç, zachowaj ostro┼╝no┼Ť─ç i kieruj si─Ö zdrowym rozs─ůdkiem.

snippet.title: Perseverance spots sky crane's Mars impact plume after touchdown
snippet.description:
Shortly after touchdown on Mars, Perseverance's right rear hazcam captured 2 images of the sky crane impact site prior to the camera's dust covers being removed. Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter imagery of impact site is show here as well. -- Wow! See the Perseverance rover dangling above Mars in this amazing landing photo: https://www.space.com/perseverance-rover-over-mars-skycrane-landing-photos

Credit: Space.com | footage courtesy: NASA/JPL-Caltech/Jason Major | produced & edited by Steve Spaleta (http://www.twitter.com/stevespaleta)

snippet.title: 6 MIN EVERYDAY STRETCH - for stiff muscles, flexibility & after your workout I Pamela Reif
snippet.description:
a quick routine for every day ÔÖą´ŞÄ it works perfectly as a cool down after ANY kind of workout! But of course, you can also do this in an office break, simply to relax, before bed or in the morning / Werbung 

We stretch our entire body! 6min = 12 exercises. Short but beneficial :)
- legs, hips & butt
- tummy 
- back & chest 
- spine 

I learned to love stretching sooooo much! I remember, about 6 months ago I definitely didn't stretch enough. This also impacted by training, since my muscles were feeling stiff and sore for longer, I started getting pain in my knees, etc. 
Now, I really look forward to a short stretch after a session. It's so relaxing, the music calms me down and you will quickly see improvements :)

Let's calm down & give our bodies some love in a different kind of way. 

__

ÔľŞ you can find FREE WORKOUT PLANS on my Instagram Channel. 30min, 45min, Beginner Friendly combinations & a DANCE plan. Check out the Highlight Bubble "Workout Plans" for that.  

Ô×× Instagram http://www.instagram.com/pamela_rf/
use #PamelaReif if you want me to see your workout pics and videos! 

ÔľŞ my Pam App ÔÖą´ŞÄ Free workout plans, recipes & tips: 
https://appurl.io/5Exh2D1Uo 

__

ÔľŞ You can always find ALL SONGS in my workout playlist. I update it weekly & it's available on Spotify, Apple Music, etc. ÔÖą´ŞÄ
http://wmg.click/GetActive

1. Charlotte Cardin ÔÇô Daddy 0:00 - 2:46
2. Faouzia & John Legend - Minefields 2:47 - 5:43
3. Birdy - Loneliness 5:44 - 7:43

__ 

Business Contact:
pamela_reif@icloud.com

__
Disclaimer:
When joining me for this workout video, you need to take some precautions as your health and safety is the most important. To avoid any injury or harm, you need to check your health with your doctor before exercising. By performing any fitness exercises without supervision like with this video, you are performing them at your own risk. See a fitness professional to give you advice on your exercise form. Pamela Reif will not be responsible or liable for any injury or harm you sustain as a result of this video.

snippet.title: UFC 259 Free Fight: Israel Adesanya vs Paulo Costa
snippet.description:
A stacked UFC 259 featuring three title fights is right around the corner on Saturday, March 6. Middleweight champion Israel Adesanya will move up a weight class to take on light heavyweight champion Jan Blachowicz in the main event. Watch Adesanya's last title defense against Paulo Costa at UFC 253 last year on Fight Island to get ready for UFC 259.

snippet.title: Meatpacking: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver (HBO)
snippet.description:
The pandemic has thrown into high relief some of the longstanding issues surrounding working conditions in meatpacking facilities. John Oliver explains why greater oversight is needed, and how we can go about getting it.

Connect with Last Week Tonight online... 

Subscribe to the Last Week Tonight YouTube channel for more almost news as it almost happens: www.youtube.com/lastweektonight 

Find Last Week Tonight on Facebook like your mom would: www.facebook.com/lastweektonight 

Follow us on Twitter for news about jokes and jokes about news: www.twitter.com/lastweektonight

snippet.title: Alan Walker x salem ilese - Fake A Smile (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
We've landed, Walkers. Welcome back to the World of Walker. I'm so excited to finally share my latest single with you all alongside the super talented @salem ilese . Our journey may have been paused at moments last year, but you've all shown that not even the worst can break this community. Thank you for being there for me and more importantly for each other. While we wait for the day to be together in person again, I hope this song resonates with you. You are not alone.

- Alan
_______________________________

Listen to the song on your preferred streaming platform: https://alanwalker.lnk.to/FakeASmile 
Fake a Smile merch: https://store.alanwalker.no/fas

#AlanWalker #salemilese #FakeASmile #2021 
_______________________________

nothingÔÇÖs wrong nothingÔÇÖs right

I swear the roof is on the ground
demons donÔÇÖt sleep at night

say IÔÇÖm doing just fine
but IÔÇÖm screaming inside like
ohhh
say these words on repeat

but itÔÇÖs alright
youÔÇÖre like heaven when IÔÇÖm in hell

đľĐâĐÇđŻđ░đ╗ĐľĐüĐéđ║đ░ đ»đŻĐľđŻđ░ đíđżđ║đżđ╗đżđ▓đ░ ĐÇĐľđĚđ║đż ĐÇđÁđ░đ│ĐâĐö đŻđ░ đ▓Đľđ┤đÁđż đ×đ║Đüđ░đŻđŞ đťđ░ĐÇĐçđÁđŻđ║đż -  ╠Ěđ┤╠ĚĐÇ╠ĚĐâ╠ĚđÂ╠ĚđŞ╠ĚđŻ╠ĚđŞ╠Ě  đ┐đżđ┐đ╗ĐľĐçđŻđŞĐćĐľ đ║đ░Đéđ░ Đâđ║ĐÇđ░ĐŚđŻĐüĐîđ║đżđ│đż đŻđ░ĐÇđżđ┤Đâ đĺĐľđ║ĐéđżĐÇđ░ đťđÁđ┤đ▓đÁđ┤ĐçĐâđ║đ░ Đľ đ║Đâđ╝đ░ đŻđ░đ╣đ▒Đľđ╗ĐîĐłđżđ│đż ĐéđÁĐÇđżĐÇđŞĐüĐéđ░ XXI ĐüĐéđżđ╗ĐľĐéĐéĐĆ đ▓đżđ╗đżđ┤đŞđ╝đŞĐÇđ░ đ┐ĐâĐéĐľđŻđ░. 

đčđżđ┤đŞđ▓đŞđ╗đ░ĐüĐĆ đ▓ĐçđżĐÇđ░ ĐäđÁĐöĐÇđŞĐçđŻđÁ đ▓Đľđ┤đÁđż Đüđ░đŻđ║ĐćĐľđżđŻđżđ▓đ░đŻđżĐŚ ┬źđ┐đ░đ╗đżđ╝đŻđŞĐćĐľ┬╗ đ×đ║Đüđ░đŻđŞ đťđ░ĐÇĐçđÁđŻđ║đż. 
20 ĐÇđżđ║Đľđ▓ ĐćĐĆ đÂĐľđŻđ║đ░ đ┐ĐÇđ░ĐćĐÄĐö đŻđ░ Đéđ▒. 
đŤđÁđ▓đżđ▓đ░ Đçđ░ĐüĐéđ║đ░ ĐŚĐŚ đ┐ĐÇđżđÁđ║ĐéĐľđ▓ đĚđ░ đżĐüĐéđ░đŻđŻĐľ 10 ĐÇđżđ║Đľđ▓ ĐäĐľđŻđ░đŻĐüđżđ▓đ░đŻĐľ Đçđżđ╗đżđ▓Đľđ║đżđ╝ đ×đ║Đüđ░đŻđŞ, đ║Đâđ╝đżđ╝ đčĐâĐéĐľđŻđ░ - đťđÁđ┤đ▓đÁđ┤ĐçĐâđ║đżđ╝. 
"X-Đäđ░đ║ĐéđżĐÇ" Đâ Đéđżđ╝Đâ ĐçđŞĐüđ╗Đľ. 
đŚđ░ 7 ĐÇđżđ║Đľđ▓ ĐçđÁĐÇđ│đżđ▓đżĐŚ đ░đ│ĐÇđÁĐüĐľĐŚ đ╝đżĐüđ║đżđ▓ĐľĐŚ đ┐ĐÇđżĐéđŞ đúđ║ĐÇđ░ĐŚđŻđŞ đťđ░ĐÇĐçđÁđŻđ║đż, đ╝đ░ĐÄĐçđŞ đ▓đÁđ╗đŞđ║đŞđ╣ đ╝đÁđ┤Đľđ╣đŻđŞđ╣ Đľ đ╝đ░ĐéđÁĐÇĐľđ░đ╗ĐîđŻđŞđ╣ ĐÇđÁĐüĐâĐÇĐü, đŻđÁ đĚĐÇđżđ▒đŞđ╗đ░ đÂđżđ┤đŻđżĐŚ đĚđ░ĐĆđ▓đŞ Đëđżđ┤đż đ▓Đľđ╣đŻđŞ, ĐĆđ║Đâ Đüđ┐ĐÇđżđ▓đżđ║Đâđ▓đ░đ▓ Đľ Đüđ┐đżđŻĐüđżĐÇĐâĐö ĐŚĐŚ đ║Đâđ╝. 
14 500 Đâđ║ĐÇđ░ĐŚđŻĐćĐľđ▓ đĚđ░đ│đŞđŻĐâđ╗đŞ. đŚđ░ ĐćđÁđ╣ Đçđ░Đü đ▓Đľđ┤ đŻđÁĐŚ đÂđżđ┤đŻđżĐŚ đ┤đżđ┐đżđ╝đżđ│đŞ đ▓Đľđ╣ĐüĐîđ║đżđ▓đŞđ╝. đÉđŻĐľ đ┐Đâđ▒đ╗ĐľĐçđŻđżĐŚ đ░đŻĐľ ĐéĐľđŻĐîđżđ▓đżĐŚ. 
đťđŞđŻĐâđ╗đżđ│đż đ╝ĐľĐüĐĆĐćĐĆ đ×đ║Đüđ░đŻđ░ đ░đŻđżđŻĐüĐâđ▓đ░đ╗đ░ Đüđ▓Đľđ╣ ĐäĐľđ╗Đîđ╝ đ┐ĐÇđż ĐÇđżĐüĐľđ╣ĐüĐîđ║Đâ ĐćđÁĐÇđ║đ▓Đâ đťđč (đáđčđŽđ▓đú), đ┤đÁ đ▓đżđŻđ░ đŻđ░ đ▒đ╝đ▓ đĚ đŻđżđ╝đÁĐÇđ░đ╝đŞ ┬źđ┐đ░đ╗đżđ╝đŻđŞĐćĐĆ┬╗, đ╝đ░đ╗đ░ Đüđ┐đżđŻĐâđ║đ░ĐéđŞ Đâđ║ĐÇđ░ĐŚđŻĐćĐľđ▓ đ▓ĐľĐÇđŞĐéđŞ Đâ đĹđżđ│đ░. 
đíđ┐đżĐçđ░Đéđ║Đâ đ╝đÁđŻĐľ đĚđ┤đ░đ▓đ░đ╗đżĐüĐĆ, Đëđż đÂĐľđŻđ║đ░ đ┐ĐÇđżĐüĐéđż đŻđÁ đ╝đ░Đö ĐľđŻĐłđżđ│đż đ▓đŞĐůđżđ┤Đâ. đŚđ╝ĐâĐłđÁđŻđ░. đÉđ╗đÁ ĐéđÁđ┐đÁĐÇ ĐĆ ĐÇđżđĚĐâđ╝ĐľĐÄ, Đëđż đ▓đżđŻđ░ đ┐ĐÇđżĐüĐéđż đ╝đ░đ╗đżĐÇđżĐüĐľđ╣ĐüĐîđ║đ░ đ║ĐâĐÇđ║đ░ đĚ ĐćđŞđŻĐľĐçđŻđŞđ╝ đŻĐâĐéĐÇđżđ╝ Đľ đŻĐâđ╗Đîđżđ▓đżĐÄ đ╗ĐÄđ▒đżđ▓ÔÇśĐÄ đ┤đż đŻđ░ĐłđżĐŚ đ║ĐÇđ░ĐŚđŻđŞ. 
đć đ▓Đľđ┤đ┐đżđ▓Đľđ┤Đî Đéđ░đ║đŞđ╝, ĐĆđ║ đ▓đżđŻđ░, đżđ┤đŻđ░: 
┬źđčđŞ%*đ┤Đâđ╣ đ┤đż đťđżĐüđ║đ▓đŞ!┬╗

đöĐÇĐâđĚĐľ, đ┐Đľđ┤đ┐đŞĐłĐľĐéĐîĐüĐĆ Đľ đŻđ░ĐéđŞĐüđŻĐľĐéĐî ­čöö, Đëđżđ▒ đŁđćđžđ×đôđ× Đľ đŁđćđÜđ×đŤđś đŻđÁ đ┐ĐÇđżđ┐ĐâĐüĐéđŞĐéđŞ! đťĐľđ╣ YouTube-đ║đ░đŻđ░đ╗ đĚđ░ĐůđŞĐëđÁđŻđŞđ╣ đ▓Đľđ┤ đ▓ĐéđżĐÇđ│đŻđÁđŻĐî Đéđ░ đ▒đżĐéĐľđ▓. đÉ đ▓đ░Đł? đčĐľđ┤đ║đ╗ĐÄĐçđ░đ╣ĐéđÁĐüĐî đ▒đÁđĚđ║đżĐłĐéđżđ▓đŻđż ĐéĐâĐé: https://www.air.io/r/zaschita

Po czteromiesi─Öcznej nieobecno┼Ťci, Przemek Ferguson wraca z nowym utworem. "M" to rozliczenie si─Ö z przesz┼éo┼Ťci─ů i pocz─ůtek nowego etapu w ┼╝yciu rapera.

Teledysk pierwotnie mia┼é ukaza─ç si─Ö w pa┼║dzierniku 2020 roku, jednak przez problemy osobiste Przemka, premiera "M" zosta┼éa od┼éo┼╝ona w czasie. Po doj┼Ťciu do pe┼éni si┼é i opuszczeniu o┼Ťrodka odwykowego, raper z Gi┼╝ycka wsp├│lnie z labelem StoproRap postanowili zaprezentowa─ç efekty wcze┼Ťniejszej pracy Fergusona.

"Publikuj─ůc "M" chc─Ö definitywnie po┼╝egna─ç si─Ö z przesz┼éo┼Ťci─ů" - m├│wi o swoim nowym numerze Przemek Ferguson. - "Teraz si─Ö skupiam na tym, co przede mn─ů i z czyst─ů g┼éow─ů zaczynam pisa─ç nowe rzeczy" - dodaje.

en.title: CLEO - KOCHAM / I love (Lyrics | Enable Subtitles)
en.description:
ÔşÉListen to CLEO - "KOCHAM" on digital services:
http://www.soundline.biz/CleoKocham/

Did you know that the state of falling in love is very similar to the feeling we experience after eating sweets? It's the happiness hormones! "KOCHAM" connects these two worlds, we shot the video in February 2020, meeting in this noble group in Zakopane.

In Cleo's video there were many distinguished guests from the world of YouTube, Instagram, TikTok: Roksana W─Ögiel, Weronika Sowa, Marcysia Ryskala, Mateusz Tr─ůbka, Mateusz Krzy┼╝anowski, Damian Kordas, Magda Bereda, Adrianna Skon, Nadia D┼éugosz, Pawe┼é Svinarski, Ula Groty┼äska, Natalia Sisik, Martyna Zbira┼äska, Micha┼é Ga┼éa, Daniel Rusin Director of Life, Ola Szko┼éka, Nicol Pniewska, Xavier Pniewski, Bart HighBart, HighMama

­čŹş SONG TEXT: ­čŹş

"I love"
I love you, I love you invariably
It has been a permanent condition for years
Why do I needlessly search
When I have the other half
I love you, I love you invariably
It has been a permanent condition for years
Why do I needlessly search

1.

sw.title: CLEO - Kocham / Nampenda (Lyrics | Wezesha Manukuu)
sw.description:
Sikiliza kipande CLEO - "KOCHAM" kwenye huduma za dijiti:
http://www.soundline.biz/CleoKocham/

Je! Unajua kuwa hali ya kupenda ni sawa na hisia tunazopata baada ya kula pipi? Ni homoni za furaha! "KOCHAM" inaunganisha walimwengu hawa wawili, tulipiga video mnamo Februari 2020, tukikutana katika kundi hili zuri huko Zakopane.

Kwenye video ya Cleo kulikuwa na wageni wengi mashuhuri kutoka ulimwengu wa YouTube, Instagram, TikTok: Roksana W─Ögiel, Weronika Sowa, Marcysia Ryskala, Mateusz Tr─ůbka, Mateusz Krzy┼╝anowski, Damian Kordas, Magda Bereda, Adrianna Skon, Nadia D┼éugosz, Pawe┼é Svinarski , Natalia Sisik, Martyna Zbira┼äska, Micha┼é Ga┼éa, Mkurugenzi wa Maisha wa Daniel Rusin, Ola Szko┼éka, Nicol Pniewska, Xavier Pniewski, Bart HighBart, HighMama

Je! Video hii ya muziki itapiga "Za Krokiem Krok" na kuwa video ya muziki ya rangi ya Cleo?

en-CA.title: CLEO - KOCHAM / I love (Lyrics | Enable Subtitles)
en-CA.description:
ÔşÉListen to CLEO - "KOCHAM" on digital services:
http://www.soundline.biz/CleoKocham/

Did you know that the state of falling in love is very similar to the feeling we experience after eating sweets? It's the happiness hormones! "KOCHAM" connects these two worlds, we shot the video in February 2020, meeting in this noble group in Zakopane.

In Cleo's video there were many distinguished guests from the world of YouTube, Instagram, TikTok: Roksana W─Ögiel, Weronika Sowa, Marcysia Ryskala, Mateusz Tr─ůbka, Mateusz Krzy┼╝anowski, Damian Kordas, Magda Bereda, Adrianna Skon, Nadia D┼éugosz, Pawe┼é Svinarski, Ula Groty┼äska, Natalia Sisik, Martyna Zbira┼äska, Micha┼é Ga┼éa, Daniel Rusin Director of Life, Ola Szko┼éka, Nicol Pniewska, Xavier Pniewski, Bart HighBart, HighMama

Will this music video beat "Za Krokiem Krok" and become Cleo's most colorful music video?

Ubuwazi ukuthi isimo sokuthandana sifanana kakhulu nomuzwa esiba nawo ngemuva kokudla amaswidi? Ama-hormone enjabulo! I- "KOCHAM" ixhuma le mihlaba emibili, sayishutha ividiyo ngoFebhuwari 2020, sihlangana kuleli qembu elihle eZakopane.

Kwividiyo kaCleo bekunezivakashi eziningi ezihlonishwayo ezivela emhlabeni we-YouTube, Instagram, TikTok: Roksana W─Ögiel, Weronika Sowa, Marcysia Ryskala, Mateusz Tr─ůbka, Mateusz Krzy┼╝anowski, Damian Kordas, Magda Bereda, Adrianna Skon, Nadia D┼éugosz, Pawe┼é Svinarski , Natalia Sisik, Martyna Zbira┼äska, Micha┼é Ga┼éa, Daniel Rusin Umqondisi Wezempilo, Ola Szko┼éka, Nicol Pniewska, Xavier Pniewski, Bart HighBart, HighMama

Ngabe le vidiyo yomculo izoshaya i- "Za Krokiem Krok" futhi ibe yividiyo yomculo kaCleo emibalabala kakhulu?

I-Instagram CLEO: https://www.instagram.com/cleo_don/

uz.title: CLEO - KOCHAM / Men sevaman (Lyrics | Subtitles-ni yoqish)
uz.description:
ÔşÉRaqamli xizmatlar bo'yicha CLEO - "KOCHAM" qismini tinglang:
http://www.soundline.biz/CleoKocham/

Sevib qolish holati shirinliklarni iste'mol qilganimizdan keyin his qilganimizga juda o'xshashligini bilasizmi? Bu baxt gormonlari! "KOCHAM" bu ikki olamni bir-biriga bog'lab turadi, biz videoni 2020 yil fevral oyida Zakopanedagi ushbu olijanob guruhda uchrashganimizda suratga olganmiz.

Kleoning videolavhasida YouTube, Instagram, TikTok dunyosidan ko'plab taniqli mehmonlar bor edi: Roksana Vigiel, Veronika Sova, Markisiya Riskala, Mateusz Trebka, Mateush Kzyzanovski, Damian Kordas, Magda Bereda, Adrianna Skon, Nadiya Dlyugosz, Pawalvin, Pawalvin , Natalya Sisik, Martina Zbiranska, Mixal Gala, Daniel Rusin Hayot direktori, Ola Szko┼éka, Nikol Pnevska, Xaver Pnevski, Bart Xayart, HighMama

Ushbu musiqiy video "Za Krokiem Krok" ni engib, Kleoning eng rangli klipiga aylanadimi?

Instagram CLEO: https://www.instagram.com/cleo_don/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@cleo
Facebook CLEO: https://www.facebook.com/CjakCLEO/

en-GB.title: CLEO - KOCHAM / I love (Lyrics | Enable Subtitles)
en-GB.description:
ÔşÉListen to CLEO - "KOCHAM" on digital services:
http://www.soundline.biz/CleoKocham/

Did you know that the state of falling in love is very similar to the feeling we experience after eating sweets? It's the happiness hormones! "KOCHAM" connects these two worlds, we shot the video in February 2020, meeting in this noble group in Zakopane.

In Cleo's video there were many distinguished guests from the world of YouTube, Instagram, TikTok: Roksana W─Ögiel, Weronika Sowa, Marcysia Ryskala, Mateusz Tr─ůbka, Mateusz Krzy┼╝anowski, Damian Kordas, Magda Bereda, Adrianna Skon, Nadia D┼éugosz, Pawe┼é Svinarski, Ula Groty┼äska, Natalia Sisik, Martyna Zbira┼äska, Micha┼é Ga┼éa, Daniel Rusin Director of Life, Ola Szko┼éka, Nicol Pniewska, Xavier Pniewski, Bart HighBart, HighMama

Will this music video beat "Za Krokiem Krok" and become Cleo's most colorful music video?

Instagram CLEO: https://www.instagram.com/cleo_don/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@cleo
Facebook CLEO: https://www.facebook.com/CjakCLEO/

­čÄĄ Words and singing: Cleo

en-US.title: CLEO - KOCHAM / I love (Lyrics | Enable Subtitles)
en-US.description:
ÔşÉListen to CLEO - "KOCHAM" on digital services:
http://www.soundline.biz/CleoKocham/

Did you know that the state of falling in love is very similar to the feeling we experience after eating sweets? It's the happiness hormones! "KOCHAM" connects these two worlds, we shot the video in February 2020, meeting in this noble group in Zakopane.

In Cleo's video there were many distinguished guests from the world of YouTube, Instagram, TikTok: Roksana W─Ögiel, Weronika Sowa, Marcysia Ryskala, Mateusz Tr─ůbka, Mateusz Krzy┼╝anowski, Damian Kordas, Magda Bereda, Adrianna Skon, Nadia D┼éugosz, Pawe┼é Svinarski, Ula Groty┼äska, Natalia Sisik, Martyna Zbira┼äska, Micha┼é Ga┼éa, Daniel Rusin Director of Life, Ola Szko┼éka, Nicol Pniewska, Xavier Pniewski, Bart HighBart, HighMama

Will this music video beat "Za Krokiem Krok" and become Cleo's most colorful music video?
